neighborhoods.name: Salinas Malecon
neighborhoods.description: Beachfront boulevard with high-rise condos, restaurants, and Ecuador's most popular Pacific resort beach
neighborhoods.character: Beach resort, malecon walkable, seasonal crowds
neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Salinas. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Chipipe
neighborhoods.description: Quieter southern beach area with calmer waters, yacht club, and more residential atmosphere
neighborhoods.character: Quiet beach residential, yacht club, family-friendly

housing.predominantType: Houses, low-rise condos, and beachside apartments

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Salinas's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Santa Elena
neighborhoods.description: Inland provincial capital with lower costs, local markets, and bus connections
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Ballenita / Punta Blanca
neighborhoods.description: Coastal communities between Salinas and Montanita with growing expat populations and ocean views
neighborhoods.character: Coastal expat, ocean views, community oriented

housing.predominantType: Modern houses, condos, and oceanview developments

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
